subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest towards God! At this appointed time plant thou the feet of steadfastness firmly upon solid ground, that divine succor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر الی الله در این میقات یوم معلوم پای استقامت بر زمین محکم نما تا عون
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
